heading: Office of Inspector General
label: 3422 Office of Inspector General
text: There shall be in the Department an Office of Inspector General, established in accordance with chapter 4 of title 5.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 210 and is classified to .section 211 of Pub. L. 96–88section 3421 of this title
Amendments2022— substituted “chapter 4 of title 5.” for “the Inspector General Act of 1978.”Pub. L. 117–286
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “chapter 4 of title 5.” for “the Inspector General Act of 1978.”Pub. L. 117–286
